title: A Peace the Night Never Spoke

mood.label: A ceasefire on paper
mood.summary: A world near 43/100 — a Lebanon ceasefire announced and broken by dawn, twenty-two killed in a Russian strike on Kyiv, and Iran walking away from talks weigh the day down, while a record-high S&P and a run of quiet medical breakthroughs keep it from going under.

sampleSources: Strudel default library — sampled piano, RolandTR808 (dough-samples)
pattern: stack(s("bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~, ~ ~ ~ ~ rim ~ ~ ~, ~ ~ hh ~ ~ ~ [hh hh] ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.4).room(0.28).hpf(120), note("d2 ~ ~ ~ bb1 ~ ~ ~ f1 ~ ~ ~ c2 ~ ~ ~").s("sine").attack(0.02).release(0.8).lpf(360).gain(0.55), note("<[d3,f3,a3] [bb2,d3,f3] [f3,a3,c4] [c3,e3,g3]>").s("piano").gain(0.5).room(0.52).rsize(5).pan(0.5), note("<[d4,f4,a4] [bb3,d4,f4] [f4,a4,c5] [c4,e4,g4]>").s("sawtooth").attack(1.4).decay(0.4).sustain(0.55).release(3.2).lpf(sine.range(440,1400).slow(14)).gain(0.12).room(0.6).rsize(6), note("d4 ~ f4 ~ e4 d4 ~ ~ c4 ~ d4 f4 ~ e4 ~ ~ g4 ~ f4 d4 ~ c4 ~ ~ a3 ~ c4 ~ d4 ~ ~ ~").s("piano").gain(0.38).room(0.44).pan(0.56).off(0.125, x => x.gain(0.15).pan(0.36).lpf(1600)).jux(rev))

lines: They said that by the morning guns would rest,
it printed clean — a line without the smoke.
But eight more names were counted before light,
a peace the night had heard but never spoke.
Over Kyiv the dark came down in iron,
and twenty-two won't see this June at all.
Yet somewhere quiet hands undid a switch —
an eye made whole, a record on the wall.
Forty-three, and the day leans heavy again,
a ceasefire and a missile in one breath.
We keep the count honest — the dawn and the dead —
still here in the weight of it, turning toward light.
